summary: Completed production-readiness testing for Razorpay subscription system with anniversary-based proration. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for proration display and complimentary upgrade note. Fixed coaching page access bug.
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/resources.py - Fixed coaching page access to be TRUE for all users (line 1625)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All subscription proration features verified: 1) Paid users get credit, manual users get zero credit, 2) 6-month upgrade anniversary = 6 months from start, 3) Coaching access is TRUE for all users, 4) Frontend displays backend proration correctly with 'complimentary upgrade' note for manual users

POST /api/subscriptions/upgrade-preview.6_month_upgrade: PASS - anniversary = 6 months from original start date

GET /api/resources/dashboard-summary.coaching_access: PASS - TRUE for all users (paid, manual, admin)
GET /api/resources/dashboard-summary.all_pages_browsable: PASS - subscription, courses, drills, workshops, materials, peer_practice all TRUE

Frontend SubscriptionManagement.jsx.proration_display: PASS - Shows correct proration from backend API
Frontend SubscriptionManagement.jsx.complimentary_note: PASS - Shows 'Your current plan was a complimentary upgrade, so no credit is applied' for manual users

bug_fixed.issue: Coaching page access was FALSE for paid users without coaching sessions
bug_fixed.root_cause: Line 1625 in resources.py used conditional logic (True if pages_accessible else has_coaching) instead of always TRUE
bug_fixed.fix: Changed coaching access to always be TRUE (browsable with items locked inside if no sessions)
